name: Caveman Commit Message Generator
body:
---
description: Generate terse caveman-style commit message
---

Generate a terse commit message for the current staged changes. Conventional Commits format. Subject: ≤50 chars, imperative, lowercase after type. Body: only when 'why' isn't obvious from subject. Why over what. No period on subject.
description_en: A slash-command prompt that writes a terse Conventional Commits message for the currently staged changes.
description_zh: 一个斜杠命令提示词，为当前暂存的改动生成简洁的 Conventional Commits 格式提交信息。
long_en: Instructs the model to look at staged changes and produce a Conventional Commits subject line (≤50 chars, imperative mood, lowercase after the type, no trailing period), adding a body only when the 'why' isn't obvious from the subject alone.
long_zh: 指示模型查看已暂存的改动，生成一条 Conventional Commits 格式的标题行（不超过 50 字符、祈使语气、type 后小写、无句末句号），只有当「为什么」这样改从标题看不出来时才补充正文。
sec_note_en: Plain text prompt intended to run inside a coding agent with access to `git diff`/staged changes; it does not itself execute commands.
sec_note_zh: 纯文本提示词，设计为在可访问 `git diff`/暂存区的编码 Agent 内运行；提示词本身不执行任何命令。
